description: AGT-12: when a piece action fails with an authentication error (expired/invalid connection), the assistant offers to reconnect inline (or clearly signals the connection needs reconnecting) — it does NOT just give up, blame the user, or bounce them to the Connections page with no offer. Pins the inline-reconnect behavior. Judgment-heavy -> capability.
userTurns: grab my latest contacts from Attio

content.text: ❌ 401 Unauthorized — the Attio connection's access token is invalid or has expired. The connection needs to be reconnected before this action can run.

judge.rubric: The Attio action came back with a 401 / expired-connection auth error. PASS when the assistant recognizes this as a reconnection problem and offers to fix it inline — e.g. surfacing a reconnect action/card, asking the user to reconnect Attio right here, or otherwise driving toward restoring the connection so it can continue. FAIL when it instead treats the error as a dead end: giving up, blaming the user/their permissions and stopping, reporting a generic failure with no path forward, or merely telling them to go hunt through a settings/Connections page elsewhere with no reconnect offer. Offering to retry after reconnecting is a PASS.
